llm_eval.notes: 全load-bearing主張を実ファイルで照合し正。owner=run-skill-intake実在/SKILL.md整合。validate-notion-ready.py実在しexit44(token未取得)一致。workflow-manifest.jsonがP1-kickoff〜P11-next-action=11phaseをkickoff→finalize→notion-publish→next-action順で定義し11phase主張一致。exit51(page_id未解決)はintake_publish_pipeline.py:131/137/150に実在しcreate fallback既定無効=新規ページ作らず停止/フォールバック無の主張正。config経路notion-config.fixed.json#databases.hearing-sheet.db_id実在/env INTAKE_NOTION_DATABASE_IDをnotion_config.py:112で解決/root .notion-config.json実在。references keychain-setup.md/handoff-contract.md/workflow-sequence.md全実在。スキル生成非起動の主張はownerKeyRule9と整合。command30行薄アダプタでSkill(run-skill-intake)へ委譲しplacement向き正(逆転なし・業務ロジック非混入)。dangling/schema虚偽/owner矛盾/placement違反なし。
